title: Potato PC
description: Adds a literal potato pc with a literal potato operating system
body:
# Potato PC
The Potato PC is a literal computer powered by a literal potato. It has four apps you can use

## Description
You can craft the Potato PC like this:
![crafting recipe lol](https://silabear.tixte.co/r/i_am_do_a_commit_crime.jpeg)
When you place it, right click on it to open the actual computer!

### Potato Discord
Potato Discord has two servers you can visit by clicking the, on the sidebar. One is the Bear Cave, and one is the Potato Discord server.

### Files
The Files app has 8 files - 3 are images and 5 are text documents. You can click on the files in the app to open them.

**Images** - 
The images app can only be opened by opening an image through the Files app.

### Games
The games app has one game, and that game is Worship-a-Potato. When you worship the potato by pressing the button, you have a chance at getting a diamond in return.

### Music
The music app lets you play Pigstep when you press the play button.
